column1: # treasure_name_en.tsv -- LAYER 3 of the desc_sources waterfall: CURATED English place phrases.
# Keyed by check flag. Most raw msb_flag_region `treasure_name` values are asset-id noise
# (award / c0000_9000 / trigflag / bare 宝死体NNN corpse numbering); only a minority carry a real
# place phrase, usually after a Japanese colon (宝箱000:魔術師の塔). tools/build_treasure_name_seed.py
# proposes candidates (junk-filtered via desc_sources.clean_treasure_name); a human translates the
# Japanese phrase to English HERE. Falls BELOW your hand overrides but ABOVE nearest-grace.
# --- seeded from clean post-colon phrases (translations reviewed; extend via the seed tool) ---
